posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am looking for the ability to perform custom calculations directly within the Chart Widget settings, similar to “Measures” in Power BI. Currently, charts are largely limited to basic aggregations (Sum, Count, Average). I’d like to have a calculation engine that allows for more complex formulas involving multiple data points or statuses.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to create more sophisticated KPIs for my CRM Sales Dashboard. Specifically, I need to calculate a Conversion Rate by dividing the number of “Won” deals by the total number of “Lost” and “Won” deals. Having this capability within the widget would eliminate the need for complex workaround formula columns and provide deeper insights directly on the dashboard.
